18 // Firmware header
19 #define MW_SERIAL_NO_LEN 16
20 #define MW_FAMILY_NAME_LEN 64
21 #define MW_PRODUCT_NAME_LEN 64
22 
34 typedef enum _MW_FAMILY_ID {
35  MW_FAMILY_ID_PRO_CAPTURE = 0x00,
36  MW_FAMILY_ID_ECO_CAPTURE = 0x01,
37  MW_FAMILY_ID_USB_CAPTURE = 0x02
38 } MW_FAMILY_ID;
39 
40 typedef struct _MW_DATE_TIME {
41  WORD wYear;
42  BYTE byMonth;
43  BYTE byDay;
44  BYTE byHour;
45  BYTE byMinute;
46  BYTE bySecond;
47  BYTE byReserved;
48 } MW_DATE_TIME;
49 
50 #define MW_FIRMWARE_HEADER_MAGIC 'HFWM'
51 #define MW_FIRMWARE_HEADER_VERSION 1
52 
59 #define MW_FIRMWARE_NAME_LEN 64
60 #define MW_FIRMWARE_SECTION_NAME_LEN 16
61 
62 #define MW_MAX_NUM_FIRMWARE_SECTIONS 16
63 
64 // Compatible ID: wProductID, chHardwareVersion and byFirmwareID
65 typedef struct _MW_FIRMWARE_INFO_HEADER {
66  DWORD dwMagic;
67  DWORD dwCheckSum;
68  WORD wVersion;
69  WORD cbHeader;
70  WORD wProductID;
71  CHAR chHardwareVersion;
72  BYTE byFirmwareID;
73  DWORD dwFirmwareVersion;
74  CHAR szProductName[MW_PRODUCT_NAME_LEN];
75  CHAR szFirmwareName[MW_FIRMWARE_NAME_LEN];
76  MW_DATE_TIME dtBuild;
77  BYTE cSections;
78 } MW_FIRMWARE_INFO_HEADER;
79 
80 typedef struct _MW_FIRMWARE_SECTION_HEADER {
81  CHAR szName[MW_FIRMWARE_SECTION_NAME_LEN];
82  DWORD cbOffset;
83  DWORD cbSection;
84  DWORD dwCheckSum;
85 } MW_FIRMWARE_SECTION_HEADER;
86 
87 typedef struct _MW_FIRMWARE_HEADER {
88  MW_FIRMWARE_INFO_HEADER infoHeader;
89  MW_FIRMWARE_SECTION_HEADER aSectionHeaders[MW_MAX_NUM_FIRMWARE_SECTIONS];
90 } MW_FIRMWARE_HEADER;
91
